_schema.description: Source of truth for ServiceNow documentation links surfaced in the AMEX instance architecture diagram. Keys match diagram element IDs (see amex-instance-architecture.html).

ew-hrsd.name: HR Service Delivery
ew-hrsd.tagline: Streamline HR workflows, boost productivity, and improve employee satisfaction with AI agents across the full employee lifecycle.
ew-hrsd.summary: HR Service Delivery reduces repetitive tasks and improves employee productivity by leveraging AI agents that handle requests and automate workflows from hiring to exit. The platform frees HR teams to focus on strategic, human-centered work while employees gain instant access to answers and services through an AI-powered front door.

feature_cards.title: AI Front Door
feature_cards.description: Give employees a next-gen AI experience to get answers and take action instantly — no tickets, no waiting.

feature_cards.title: Agentic Self-Service
feature_cards.description: One place to search, ask, speak, or type. AI handles repetitive tasks so your team focuses on meaningful work.

feature_cards.title: Manager Productivity
feature_cards.description: Managers get a single place to run tasks, team approvals, and growth conversations with help from AI agents.

feature_cards.title: HR Agent Productivity
feature_cards.description: HR teams resolve cases fast, with AI agents handling routine requests and escalating only the complex ones.

key_capabilities: AI agents automate requests across employee lifecycle
One unified portal replacing multiple HR channels

ew-wsd.name: Workplace Service Delivery
ew-wsd.tagline: Automate and simplify workplace tasks for a smooth-running, connected employee experience.
ew-wsd.summary: Workplace Service Delivery unifies workplace data and processes across disconnected systems. It brings employee engagement and facilities workflows together on a single platform, offering integrated insights and automated actions powered by AI to support business growth.

feature_cards.title: Space Planning
feature_cards.description: Right-size your space with AI insights. Optimize your real estate portfolio with proactive trend and usage data.

feature_cards.title: Operational Efficiency
feature_cards.description: Streamline workplace service requests and maintenance. Automate tasks via schedules, sensors, and asset conditions.

feature_cards.title: Reservations & Scheduling
feature_cards.description: Reduce booking friction with AI-driven insights. Improve office resource utilization and employee experience.

feature_cards.title: Health & Safety Management
feature_cards.description: Minimize avoidable risk with simplified assessment and monitoring. Employees report concerns easily; hazards stay visible.

key_capabilities: Mobile access for hybrid and remote workers

ew-sop.name: Source-to-Pay Operations
ew-sop.tagline: Automate procurement workflows end-to-end with AI.
ew-sop.summary: Source-to-Pay Operations reduces manual work across sourcing and purchasing processes, freeing teams to focus on strategic priorities like price negotiation and cost optimization through AI-powered automation.

feature_cards.title: Source-to-Contract
feature_cards.description: AI agents gather requirements and surface savings opportunities while accelerating vendor onboarding without manual intervention.

feature_cards.title: Procure-to-Pay
feature_cards.description: Streamline purchasing with guided workflows, intelligent approvals, and automated invoice processing at scale.

feature_cards.title: Supplier Relationship Management
feature_cards.description: Reduce manual work in vendor onboarding, management, and offboarding while tracking performance metrics centrally.

feature_cards.title: Autonomous Orchestration
feature_cards.description: End-to-end process automation across teams and systems — before, between, and after transactions.

key_capabilities: AI agent-driven task automation across procurement
Guided buying with clear approval workflows

ew-tprm.name: Third-Party Risk Management
ew-tprm.tagline: Take control of the third-party risk lifecycle, from onboarding to retirement.
ew-tprm.summary: Third-Party Risk Management helps organizations continuously monitor critical vendors to evaluate, mitigate, and remediate risks. Centralize vendor management in one location and transform assessment processes with automation and intelligence.

feature_cards.title: Onboarding, Offboarding & Renewals
feature_cards.description: Perform due diligence and assessments at all relationship stages with automated built-in processes.

feature_cards.title: Risk Intelligence & Monitoring
feature_cards.description: Integrate targeted risk intelligence scores and ratings for continuous insights across your vendor ecosystem.

feature_cards.title: Third-Party Portal
feature_cards.description: Connect and collaborate with third parties in a single location for all risk management activities.

feature_cards.title: Portfolio Management
feature_cards.description: Eliminate spreadsheets with a centralized database for third-party information and concentration risk mapping.

er-irm.name: Integrated Risk Management
er-irm.tagline: Make risk-informed decisions and increase efficiency with real-time intelligence and automated workflows.
er-irm.summary: Integrated Risk Management operationalizes risk and resilience across your enterprise on a single platform. Continuously monitor risks and controls while automating compliance workflows, enabling organizations to manage governance, risk, and compliance strategies with confidence and efficiency.

feature_cards.title: Policy & Compliance Management
feature_cards.description: Automate and manage policy lifecycles while continuously monitoring for compliance across your organization.

feature_cards.title: Risk Management
feature_cards.description: Enable fine-grained business impact analysis to prioritize and respond to identified risks.

feature_cards.title: Operational Resilience Management
feature_cards.description: Gain real-time visibility into the resilience of your technology, people, processes, and facilities.

feature_cards.title: Audit Management
feature_cards.description: Use risk data to scope and prioritize audit plans while automating cross-functional processes.

key_capabilities: Continuous monitoring and regulatory change insights
AI-powered workflow automation and no-code playbooks
Unified single data model eliminating silos
Risk quantification with FAIR analysis integration

er-bcm.name: Business Continuity Management
er-bcm.tagline: Plan, exercise, and recover from disasters effectively with enterprise automation.
er-bcm.summary: Business Continuity Management enables organizations to harmonize business continuity, disaster recovery, and crisis management through real-time integration with the ServiceNow CMDB. Build automated workflows and implement recovery strategies for any disruption.

feature_cards.title: Business Impact Analysis
feature_cards.description: Find and prioritize business services to produce recovery time and point objectives (RTO and RPO).

feature_cards.title: Exercise Management
feature_cards.description: Practice recovery plans during normal operations to assess preparedness and identify planning gaps.

feature_cards.title: Crisis Management
feature_cards.description: Activate continuity plans and monitor ongoing completion of recovery tasks during a crisis event in real time.

feature_cards.title: Emergency Mass Notifications
feature_cards.description: Send emergency communications quickly through 25+ channels including email, text, and phone.

er-privacy.name: Privacy Management
er-privacy.tagline: Turn privacy complexity into operational control on a single unified platform.
er-privacy.summary: Privacy Management unifies privacy risk, compliance, and operations to help organizations meet regulatory deadlines, stay audit-ready, and build customer trust. AI accelerates assessments and ongoing compliance activities while providing real-time visibility into privacy risks across the enterprise.

feature_cards.title: Compliance Management
feature_cards.description: Map obligations across jurisdictions, monitor regulatory changes, and generate compliance evidence instantly.

feature_cards.title: Privacy Operations
feature_cards.description: Automate assessments, maintain records of processing activities, and embed privacy controls across the enterprise.

feature_cards.title: Risk Management
feature_cards.description: Identify, prioritize, and remediate privacy risks with automated workflows and continuous monitoring.

feature_cards.title: Data Subject Rights
feature_cards.description: Automate DSAR fulfillment and meet regulatory deadlines without increasing operational overhead.

key_capabilities: Real-time privacy risk visibility and monitoring

is-itsm.name: IT Service Management
is-itsm.tagline: Align IT service management with ITIL standards to manage access, availability, and fulfill service requests at scale.
is-itsm.summary: ServiceNow ITSM intelligently delivers resilient enterprise IT services on a unified AI platform. It combines people, processes, and workflows to boost IT productivity and create exceptional employee experiences through automation and real-time insights.

stats.label: saved per request with Now Assist

feature_cards.title: Resilient IT Services
feature_cards.description: Keep IT services responsive and scalable using AI agents and performance analytics to autonomously complete tasks.

feature_cards.title: Staff Productivity
feature_cards.description: Unify people, data, and workflows with automated incident routing and intelligent AI recommendations.

feature_cards.title: 24/7 Employee Support
feature_cards.description: Round-the-clock IT support via a mobile-friendly portal and AI Voice Agent, with AI search and assistive capabilities.

feature_cards.title: Single-Platform Transformation
feature_cards.description: Unite AI agents, data, and workflows on one enterprise-grade platform built for scale and trust.

is-itam.name: IT Asset Management
is-itam.tagline: Automate the end-to-end lifecycle for software, hardware, and cloud assets to optimize costs while reducing risk.
is-itam.summary: IT Asset Management runs on the ServiceNow AI Platform to automate the full asset lifecycle. AI Agents automate tasks from planning to end-of-life to improve data accuracy across contracts, costs, and compliance. ITAM connects to catalogs, CMDB, and procurement for real-time visibility.

feature_cards.title: Lifecycle Management
feature_cards.description: Automate tracking, usage, and retirement of IT assets. Maximize value, reduce risk, and maintain compliance.

feature_cards.title: Audit Readiness
feature_cards.description: Maintain comprehensive, accurate asset and license records. Respond quickly and demonstrate compliance.

feature_cards.title: Cloud FinOps
feature_cards.description: Automate cloud cost tracking and forecasting. Use real-time insights for smarter multicloud decisions.

feature_cards.title: Inventory Management
feature_cards.description: Improve inventory accuracy and reduce loss. Track, receive, and manage assets with AI agents.

key_capabilities: Real-time visibility across all IT assets
Automated lifecycle workflows and AI agents

is-itom.name: IT Operations Management
is-itom.tagline: Stop chasing outages and incidents with AIOps that provides insight and autonomous resolution.
is-itom.summary: ServiceNow ITOM modernizes IT operations by federating signals from systems and services to find unknown issues before they become incidents. It integrates natively with ITSM to deliver resilient digital operations across hybrid and cloud environments.

feature_cards.title: Dynamic Service Mapping
feature_cards.description: Auto-build dynamic service maps with the Common Services Data Model to provide business context across hybrid and cloud.

feature_cards.title: Event Intelligence
feature_cards.description: Correlate and de-duplicate alerts across monitoring tools using AIOps to reduce noise and prioritize actionable incidents.

feature_cards.title: Agentic Remediation
feature_cards.description: Reduce repeat incidents — identify root cause patterns and trigger orchestrated workflows automatically.

feature_cards.title: Change Impact Analysis
feature_cards.description: Schedule service changes with confidence by seeing downstream impact before you commit.

key_capabilities: Real-time service health and anomaly detection
Automated discovery of IT resource dependencies

is-sir.name: Security Incident Response
is-sir.tagline: Respond rapidly to evolving threats with Security Incident Response.
is-sir.summary: Security Incident Response enables organizations to manage threat exposure proactively, react faster with collaborative workflows, and maintain cyber resilience. It automates incident prioritization and remediation across security and IT teams while providing real-time visibility into security posture and SOC performance.

feature_cards.title: Workflow Management
feature_cards.description: Automate assignments and coordinate incident prioritization and remediation across IT and security teams.

feature_cards.title: Operations Dashboard
feature_cards.description: Monitor SOC performance and identify where teams and response workflows need to evolve.

feature_cards.title: Major Security Incident Management
feature_cards.description: Respond collaboratively to critical incidents like ransomware and data breaches with coordinated processes.

feature_cards.title: MITRE ATT&CK Integration
feature_cards.description: Stay ahead of attackers with advanced context through MITRE ATT&CK framework integration.

is-tprm.name: Third-Party Risk Management
is-tprm.tagline: Take control of the third-party risk lifecycle, from onboarding to retirement.
is-tprm.summary: Third-Party Risk Management helps organizations continuously monitor critical vendors to evaluate, mitigate, and remediate risks. Centralize vendor management in one location and transform assessment processes with automation and intelligence.

feature_cards.title: Onboarding, Offboarding & Renewals
feature_cards.description: Perform due diligence and assessments at all relationship stages with automated built-in processes.

feature_cards.title: Risk Intelligence & Monitoring
feature_cards.description: Integrate targeted risk intelligence scores and ratings for continuous insights across your vendor ecosystem.

feature_cards.title: Third-Party Portal
feature_cards.description: Connect and collaborate with third parties in a single location for all risk management activities.

feature_cards.title: Portfolio Management
feature_cards.description: Eliminate spreadsheets with a centralized database for third-party information and concentration risk mapping.
